summary: Stock Dashboard feature complete E2E testing - Backend: 10/10 tests passed, Frontend: All features working correctly

issues: Some SKU entries display empty/null names - this is a data quality issue (missing sku_name in stock records), not a code bug
One stock item shows negative quantity (-5) - this may indicate a data issue or stock adjustment, but UI handles it correctly

details: Sidebar has 'Stock Dashboard' link under DISTRIBUTION section
Summary cards display: Total Stock (7,205 units), SKU Types (3 products), Locations (1 warehouse), Distributors (1 partner)
By Location tab shows expandable location cards - clicking expands to show SKU breakdown table
By SKU tab shows stock by product table with columns: SKU, Total Quantity, Locations, Distribution %
By Distributor tab shows distributor cards with location/SKU counts and total units
Search filter works to filter by location/distributor/SKU name
City dropdown filter populated with available cities (Margao)
Distributor dropdown filter populated with available distributors (Test, ABC Distribution Co)
Refresh button reloads stock data with loading state indicator

critical_code_review_comments: Stock Dashboard implementation is complete and well-structured
API returns comprehensive data with by_location, by_sku, by_distributor breakdowns
City filter uses cities from API response dynamically
Distributor filter populated from separate distributors endpoint
data-testid attributes properly added for automated testing
Location cards are expandable with proper collapse/expand toggle
All tabs render appropriate data views
data_quality_notes: Some stock records have null/empty sku_name - this is existing data, not a code bug
One stock record shows -5 quantity - may be intentional stock adjustment
SKU Types count (3) differs from actual SKU items (4) because empty sku_id entries are counted differently
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing stock data (7,205 units across 1 location, 1 distributor)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Dashboard feature fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_stock_dashboard.py. All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend tested via Playwright - all tabs (By Location, By SKU, By Distributor), filters (Search, City, Distributor), and Refresh button work correctly. Data quality note: some SKU names are null/empty in stock records - this is data-related, not a code issue.
